When they woke up, they were 61,326 miles from Earth.

quarantine_items.title: Simulation software models aerial firefighting dynamics in real time

The work is published in the CEAS Aeronautical Journal. Continue reading Simulation software models aerial firefighting dynamics in real time at Aerospace Testing International.
